title: dischidia carinata
intro: Dischidia carinata, also known as the string of nickels or string of coins, is a type of epiphytic succulent native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant's leaves are often used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. Consuming the leaves is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried, powdered, or infused in hot water to create teas or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
